rationale: Hypothesizes that tech exposure should be reduced when the Gold/Copper ratio spikes, signaling deflationary growth fears.
expected_failure_mode: The Gold/Copper ratio may be driven by commodity-specific supply shocks rather than macro deflation fears.
stop_conditions: hybrid candidate fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Correlation between ratio spikes and QQQ drawdowns falls below 0.4.
TECL share count is negatively impacted during inflationary tech rallies.
